name: Pesto French Bread Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice French bread in half lengthwise (2 halves for a 1 lb loaf or 4 halves for 2 1/2 lb loaves).
2. Spread cut sides of bread with pesto sauce (about 1 cup).
3. Top with black olives and slices of Roma tomatoes.
4. Top generously with mozzarella cheese and 1/4 to 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese.
5. Bake in oven until cheese is bubbly.
6. Serve as appetizers or a main meal. Slice as desired.
